question: [File: 'File Name: grpc/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/grpc/service/TopicMessageService.java -> Scope: Critical: Unintended permanent freezing of funds'] [Function: isComplete()] Can an unprivileged external user set endTime to exactly DomainUtils.now() + endTimeInterval nanoseconds, causing isComplete() to oscillate around the boundary condition and never definitively return true, keeping the subscription permanently open?
